response.justification: Candidate has extensive full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with hands-on work in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and recent involvement in AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators. Strong background in testing, DevOps, and architecture, plus polyglot experience across Java, TypeScript, and other languages aligns well with the role. Some concerns around overlapping employment dates and limited explicit Nest.js/Kotlin experience, but overall a strong fit warranting an interview.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB matching primary stack
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, courses, and a custom test runner (Trial)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned despite it being part of primary stack
Overlapping employment dates across multiple roles raise timeline credibility questions
Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java work for backend services as required by secondary stack
